\tzpentry{ID4410}{Delta Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4410 introduces Delta Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \delta\Hhat_{\mathrm{GW}} \sim -\frac{1}{2} \frac{\mathrm{d}^2 h_{ij}}{\mathrm{d}t^2} Q^{ij}, \end{equation}
